pulse: The Real Estate sector is currently trading at a median EV/EBITDA of 20.4x and a P/E of 40.0x, both of which are higher than the broader market's forward P/E of 21.6x, indicating a premium valuation likely due to growth expectations, with a median revenue growth of 11.0%. Notably, Welltower (WELL) stands out with a staggering P/E of 144.8x despite only 8.6% profit margins and -28.2% operating margin, reflecting a significant valuation spread with Simon Property Group (SPG), which trades at just 14.4x P/E and boasts 72.7% profit margins. Investors should be cautious as the current earnings cycle may face headwinds from rising interest rates, impacting real estate valuations amidst the rotation to cyclicals and increasing cost of capital.
